title: Win $10,000 For A Dream Vacation
description: We want to make all your vacation dreams come true! Whether you’d love lounging on a beach in Hawaii, exploring the national parks, or indulging in luxurious resorts in Las Vegas, this prize offers you the freedom to choose your perfect escape… or you could take the cash for whatever you choose!

title: Win A $10,000 Cash Boost
description: Imagine the thrill of a $10,000 Cash Boost to your bank account. Whether you’d use it to pay down debt, kick-start a dream project, take a well-deserved vacation or just breathe a little easier with extra money in the bank, $10,000 can be a game-changer. It’s more than just money. It’s freedom, opportunity and a fresh start – and it could be all yours real soon. A winner is guaranteed, so get your entries in daily!

title: Win $10,000 To Fund Your Future
description: We’re giving away $10,000 you could use to help fund your goals and make your future bright! You could use it toward buying a home, taking care of family, going back to school, paying off bills or even saving for retirement. Dream big and claim your free entries to win now

title: $10,000 Spooktacular Cash
description: Sweet surprises are around every corner this October, including this chance to win not 1, but 2 $5,000 Spooktacular Cash prizes that even puts those “full size candy bar houses” to shame. Win big and you could use the money to treat yourself to some grown-up fun like updating your wardrobe for the season, taking a frighteningly fun Fall getaway or just staying cozy indoors and paying off some bills. No matter what you’d do with the money, just make sure you claim your entries if you want to be one of our big cash winners this Halloween.

title: $10,000 American Dream
description: We’re giving away two guaranteed $5,000 cash prizes to help make some incredible American Dreams come true like helping pay your rent or mortgage, taking care of your family or just putting some extra cash in the bank. Claim your entries to win so you don’t miss out!

title: Win $10,000 For Gas & Groceries
description: A little extra money can go a long way toward the essentials, so just imagine what an incredible $10,000 Cash could do to help you and your family. You could stock your shelves and fridge with all your favorite foods, gas up all your vehicles and still have tons of money in the bank for whatever you choose. Claim your entries to win and the cash could be in your hands in no time.

title: Win $10,000 Thankful For You Prize
description: We’re giving away $10,000 cash because we’re thankful for YOU! From now until Thanksgiving night you can claim free entries to win all the money you need to help make your season extra special. Whether you’d use it for a festive feast, to treat your loved ones, or spread some holiday cheer, this prize is our way of saying “Thank You” for playing our games, entering our sweepstakes and helping make PCH the place where America plays to win!
